---
title: "Recipe 1: Phylogenetic signal"
author: "Flo"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(here)
source("https://michaelalfaro.github.io/eeb187-demos/recipes/code/helpers.R")

# ── 1. Load your bundle and pavo data ───────────────────────────
bundle   <- load_bundle(here("data/scarinae-78-bundle"))
bundle$tree$tip.label <- gsub("^([A-Za-z]+_[a-z]+).*", "\\1", bundle$tree$tip.label)
dups <- duplicated(bundle$tree$tip.label)
if (any(dups)) {
  bundle$tree <- ape::drop.tip(bundle$tree, bundle$tree$tip.label[dups])
}

pavo_csv <- read.csv(here("data/traits_df_78.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# ── 2. Match tree to data ───────────────────────────────────────
matched <- match_tree_data(bundle$tree, pavo_csv, species_col = "species")
tree    <- matched$tree
dat     <- matched$data
cat("Working with", length(tree$tip.label), "species\n")

# ── 3. Blomberg's K for all 6 pavo variables ───────────────────
K_table <- format_K_table(dat, tree,
                          vars = c("m", "A", "Jc", "Jt", "m_dS", "m_dL"))
print(K_table)

# ── 4. Pagel's lambda for comparison ───────────────────────────
lambda_results <- data.frame(
  Variable = character(0),
  lambda   = numeric(0),
  p_value  = numeric(0),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
for (v in c("m", "A", "Jc", "Jt", "m_dS", "m_dL")) {
  x <- setNames(dat[[v]], dat$species)
  check_trait(x, name = v, tree = tree)
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  overlap  <- intersect(names(x), tree$tip.label)
  t_pruned <- ape::drop.tip(tree, setdiff(tree$tip.label, overlap))
  x <- x[t_pruned$tip.label]
  res <- phytools::phylosig(t_pruned, x, method = "lambda", test = TRUE)
  lambda_results <- rbind(lambda_results, data.frame(
    Variable = v,
    lambda   = round(res$lambda, 3),
    p_value  = round(res$P, 4),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ))
}
print(lambda_results)

# ── 5. PCA for contMap ──────────────────────────────────────────
pavo_vars <- c("m", "A", "Jc", "Jt", "m_dS", "m_dL")
trait_mat <- dat[, pavo_vars]
rownames(trait_mat) <- dat$species
complete  <- complete.cases(trait_mat)
trait_mat <- trait_mat[complete, ]
tree_pca  <- ape::drop.tip(tree, setdiff(tree$tip.label, rownames(trait_mat)))
trait_mat <- trait_mat[tree_pca$tip.label, ]
pc  <- prcomp(trait_mat, scale. = TRUE)
pc1 <- setNames(pc$x[, "PC1"], rownames(pc$x))
check_trait(pc1, tree = tree_pca)

# ── 6. contMap ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
cm <- phytools::contMap(tree_pca, pc1, plot = FALSE)
plot(cm, type = "fan", fsize = 0.5, lwd = 3,
     legend = 0.7 * max(nodeHeights(tree_pca)))
title("PC1 of color pattern mapped on phylogeny")

# ── 7. Save PDF ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
pdf(here("figures/recipe1-contmap-pc1.pdf"), width = 10, height = 10)
plot(cm, type = "fan", fsize = 0.5, lwd = 3,
     legend = 0.7 * max(nodeHeights(tree_pca)))
title("PC1 of color pattern mapped on phylogeny")
dev.off()
cat("Saved: figures/recipe1-contmap-pc1.pdf\n")

# ── 8. Summary table ────────────────────────────────────────────
summary_table <- merge(K_table, lambda_results, by = "Variable",
                       suffixes = c("_K", "_lambda"))
print(summary_table)
```
